entries.title: Pit any two games against each other
entries.body: Tap the ⚔ icon in the toolbar to open Game Face-Off. Pick any two games from your library and instantly see them compared across rating, value, hours, ROI, and engagement — with a radar chart, stat-by-stat table, recent activity sparklines, and a computed verdict declaring the winner. Perfect for settling the 'was it worth it?' debate once and for all.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
